arts.ttl: Newcastle, Wolves’ €25M-Rated Target on Aston Villa Shortlist Amid PSG Doubt
arts.sum: With the January transfer window open, Paris Saint-Germain has a chance to offload players who no longer fit into their plans—Marco Asensio being one of them. Since November 30, Asensio’s role has diminished significantly. The former Real Madrid star has lost his place in the starting lineup and has barely featured off the bench.
